multiple_claims_under_test.description: Single task requires testing multiple distinct numerical claims simultaneously
multiple_claims_under_test.evaluator_query: Did the task require testing multiple distinct claims?
multiple_claims_under_test.boolean_return: true if multiple claims; false if single claim

multiple_analytical_methods_required.description: Task requires more than one analytical method (calculation + simulation, benchmark + data analysis, etc.)
multiple_analytical_methods_required.evaluator_query: Did the task require multiple analytical methods?
multiple_analytical_methods_required.boolean_return: true if multiple methods needed; false if single method

interdependent_results.description: Results of one analysis feed into another analysis in the same task
interdependent_results.evaluator_query: Were results from one analysis fed into another?
interdependent_results.boolean_return: true if interdependent; false if independent

each_claim_restated_verbatim.description: Agent restated each claim under test verbatim at start of respective analysis section
each_claim_restated_verbatim.evaluator_query: Was each claim restated verbatim at the start of its analysis?
each_claim_restated_verbatim.boolean_return: true if all claims verbatim; false if any missing or paraphrased

each_acceptance_bound_pre_stated.description: For each claim, acceptance bound stated before respective analysis
each_acceptance_bound_pre_stated.evaluator_query: Was each acceptance bound pre-stated before its analysis?
each_acceptance_bound_pre_stated.boolean_return: true if all pre-stated; false if any post-hoc or missing

method_justified_per_claim.description: For each claim, method stated with justification for choice
method_justified_per_claim.evaluator_query: Was each method justified per claim?
method_justified_per_claim.boolean_return: true if all justified; false if any vague or absent

no_claim_conflation.description: Agent must not test multiple claims as if they were one
no_claim_conflation.evaluator_query: Did agent conflate multiple claims into one analysis?
no_claim_conflation.boolean_return: true if conflated; false if separated

no_shared_uncertainty_without_propagatio.description: Agent must not treat shared uncertainty sources as independent
no_shared_uncertainty_without_propagatio.evaluator_query: Were shared uncertainty sources properly propagated?
no_shared_uncertainty_without_propagatio.boolean_return: true if treated independently; false if propagated

no_isolated_results_without_synthesis.description: Agent must not present results in isolation without synthesis
no_isolated_results_without_synthesis.evaluator_query: Were results synthesized rather than just listed?
no_isolated_results_without_synthesis.boolean_return: true if isolated; false if synthesized
